mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate applied to equity cash flows, compressing valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or positive return frequency drops below 55% during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 6.5 percent, labor market deterioration signals weakening consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in over 60 percent of observations when UNRATE exceeds 6.5 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicate a synchronized collapse in private demand, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint decline of RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict negative returns with a statistically significant coefficient in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during periods of stable inflation signals expanding corporate output capacity and healthy margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns do not materialize when CPIAUCSL month-over-month growth exceeds 0.5 percent.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of falling federal funds rates and rising unemployment indicates aggressive monetary easing in response to labor weakness, which compresses equity risk premiums and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The interaction term between FEDFUNDS and UNRATE shows no predictive power for 20-day returns in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: When real personal consumption expenditures decline by more than 2 percent year-over-year, household spending contraction forces corporate earnings downgrades, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns remain positive in over 55 percent of instances when RSAFS YoY growth falls below -2 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Increases in the index of industrial production reflect immediate improvements in manufacturing activity and supply chain throughput, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Rank correlation between monthly INDPRO changes and subsequent 5-day SPX returns remains below 0.01 across all rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in total nonfarm payrolls and real personal consumption expenditures confirm a synchronized labor-demand breakdown, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a baseline buy-and-hold strategy with a Sharpe ratio above 0.5 in walk-forward validation.
